page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. The system features 48 physical cores and 48 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. It is equipped with 384 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

A primary feature of this instance is its integrated local storage, which consists of 11519 GB of SSD capacity. This massive local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 120 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer rates. The instance runs on a KVM hypervisor, ensuring secure virtualization and dedicated resource allocation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i5.12xlarge offers a high density of local SSD storage and memory relative to its compute resources, making it highly efficient for workloads that require large local datasets without the overhead of network-attached storage. The lack of hyperthreading means each of the 48 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, providing predictable compute performance.

This hardware profile is optimized for storage-intensive and database workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, distributed file systems, and data warehousing applications that benefit from high-capacity local SSDs and substantial memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 48 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 384 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB per core. A key highlight is its substantial local storage capacity, offering 11519 GB of SSD storage alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 120 Gbps. With a single-thread-per-core configuration, the server delivers predictable compute performance. This resource profile is highly efficient for workloads requiring massive local storage and high-speed data access without relying on external storage networks. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, and data warehousing applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 11519 GB of local SSD storage, designed for high-throughput database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.12xlarge features 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 11519 GB local SSD storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage and database instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and over eleven terabytes of local SSD storage.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores running at 3.4 GHz
384 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
11519 GB of high-performance local SSD storage
120 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for rapid data transfer
Single-thread-per-core configuration for predictable compute performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, and data warehousing
